docs.title: Agentic AI & RAG Bootcamp — handbook
docs.text: Welcome. This site mirrors the GitHub repository with the same content: curriculum, labs, and interview-depth playbooks.

docs.title: Read first (interview track)
docs.text:
1. Start here — setup & workflow
  2. AI engineering playbook — dense concepts, failures, question bank
  3. Agentic AI engineering — tools, loops, multi-agent, production patterns
  4. Interview companion — how to answer under time pressure
  5. Career & portfolio — fork, extend, present to hiring managers

docs.text:
